summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

raw_articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
raw_articles.summary: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

raw_articles.title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
raw_articles.summary: Johannes Heidecke’s departure comes as OpenAI tries to further integrate its research and safety teams.

raw_articles.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
raw_articles.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

raw_articles.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
raw_articles.summary: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public Instagram account could be used in AI creations without the account owner's permission. […]

raw_articles.title: Microsoft Reports a Massive 25 Percent Jump in Emissions
raw_articles.summary: Data centers are driving up the company’s use of electricity—and carbon pollution.

raw_articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
raw_articles.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered "a pattern of theft of Apple's trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at Apple." In addition to OpenAI, the lawsuit also names IO Products - Jony Ive's hardware startup, […]

raw_articles.title: The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems
raw_articles.summary: Companies are starting to choose AI models by task, cost and control, not just leaderboard rank.

raw_articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
raw_articles.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

raw_articles.title: 57% of enterprises have watched AI agents be confidently wrong. The fix is an agentic context layer, but who has one?
raw_articles.summary: An enterprise AI agent answers with total confidence, but the number is wrong. Nobody catches it until someone traces it back to a stale metric definition or a document the retrieval system never pulled. The model did not fail. The context it was given did.In the past six months, 57% of enterprises traced a confident but wrong AI agent answer to missing or inconsistent business context, and 31% said it happened more than once, according to a VB Pulse June 2026 survey of 101 qualified enterprises

raw_articles.title: OpenAI power consolidates under co-founder Greg Brockman ahead of prospective IPO
raw_articles.summary: With Fidji Simo's official departure from OpenAI due to a chronic medical issue, Greg Brockman's role has become clearer.

raw_articles.title: Apple Is Suing OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Secrets
raw_articles.summary: The iPhone maker claims OpenAI encouraged poached employees to bring over confidential presentations, secret prototypes, and key supplier details.

raw_articles.title: How Apple stock rode the AI rollercoaster to record highs in 1 chart
raw_articles.summary: Apple stayed true to itself in the AI race, and Wall Street is finally rewarding the stock for it.

raw_articles.title: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Work, a cloud-based AI agent that manages tasks across email, Slack and calendars
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI on Thursday launched ChatGPT Work, a new AI agent embedded inside its flagship chatbot that aims to transform ChatGPT from a question-and-answer tool into an autonomous work platform capable of executing complex, multi-step tasks across users' email, calendars, code repositories, and messaging apps.The product is powered by OpenAI's latest flagship model, GPT-5.6, and is designed to go far beyond generating text. raw_articles.title: Meta stock got the 18% pop Jim Cramer said it could on cloud news. What's next?
raw_articles.summary: Investors are also celebrating Meta's launch Thursday of Muse Spark 1.1.

raw_articles.title: Wall Street is debating the AI buildout. Enterprises just answered: 86% say their GPUs run at half capacity or less
raw_articles.summary: Enterprise companies are running AI agents ahead of the controls needed to manage them — and they deployed that way knowingly. That is the central finding from VentureBeat Research's June survey of 573 technical leaders at companies with 100 or more employees, fielded across five parallel surveys of the agentic stack. Enterprises are now retrofitting to catch up with their own standards, and they are budgeting for it: Roughly six in 10 enterprises plan to switch or add vendors in each of fi
